---
applyTo: "_maps/**"
---
# _maps/ — Auto-generated files

These files are **overwritten automatically** by `.build/update-maps/sync_maps.py`,
which pulls map metadata from GitHub. Manual edits will be lost on the next sync.

To make a permanent change to a map entry:
- Edit the source data or the sync script in `.build/update-maps/`
- Do **not** edit `_maps/*.html` directly
